{{Infobox artifact
| name = Penance
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Penance Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Penance is a heavenly weapon of immense power, described as an absolute decree of death. It functions not merely as a projectile but as a tool that can decide the [[fate]] of its target, capable of striking down even a [[Monarch]]. While it is often manifested as an arrow that seeks out its prey, the true version of the weapon does not require physical contact to be effective. The weapon has been a central prize in competitions, with various factions fighting for control over it. Beyond its use as a direct weapon, it carries significant value as a tool for blackmail or as a psychological threat. The creation of Penance was a long-term project for the [[Soulsmith]] [[Ozmanthus]], who spent years attempting to perfect it as a way to atone for his past failures. Although he produced several improved prototypes and arrowheads that were kept in various armories, he never successfully completed the perfect version. In recent events, an [[Abidan]] gifted Penance to [[Yerin]], who utilized its power to strike a target.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Penance is a heavenly weapon and silver-edged black arrowhead that serves as a prize in a tournament where eight people compete for its possession. This weapon, which feels like death and finality, is capable of removing a [[Dreadgod]] and has even prevented [[Seshethkunaaz]] from becoming a [[Remnant]]. While many entities like the [[Akura clan]], [[Reigan Shen]], and various [[dragons]] seek to win it, the item remains beyond the reach of even the [[Monarchs]]. [[Eithan]] may claim the weapon to blackmail [[Reigan Shen]], and its presence as a threat currently forces enemies to follow rules and prevents [[Heralds]] from attacking [[Fury]]. Ultimately, the arrowhead is handed to [[Yerin]] by an [[Abidan]], providing her with a technique that could kill [[Malice]] or Sophara's great-grandfather.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a weapon that can be used to remove a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a prize that can be obtained in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth]] will use [[Penance]] on [[Akura Malice]] or [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a weapon that [[Eithan]] might claim.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is something [[Reigan Shen]] has a chance at.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a prize that the [[dragon]] can win in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a heavenly weapon that eight people are fighting for.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] can use [[Penance]] to blackmail [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is an item that [[dragons]] might get.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a competition the [[Akura clan]] hopes to win.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is causing everyone to play by the rules for now.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a threat that prevents enemy [[Heralds]] from attacking [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is someone who would kill [[Malice]] if [[Yerin]] loses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] stated his actions had nothing to do with [[Penance]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a technique that could be used on [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is beyond the reach of the [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is an arrow that is going to kill Sophara's great-grandfather.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is a silver-edged black arrowhead handed to [[Yerin]] by an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is described as feeling like death and finality.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] is something [[Yerin]] can use.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Penance]] prevented [[Seshethkunaaz]] from becoming a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Penance]] is a weapon that had instantly slain a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Penance]] is an arrowhead of absolute death created by [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Penance]] is a prize gifted to [[Yerin]] by the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Penance]] created prototypes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Penance]] is a [[Monarch-killing weapon]] of [[Ozmanthus]]'s creation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Penance is a unique, single-use arrowhead that served as the prize for the [[Abidan]]'s [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament. When [[Mercy]] unleashed this attack, the projectile actively sought its intended prey and served as a profound test of will for [[Lindon]]. The weapon does not require a bow or physical contact to function, as it operates by deciding who is dead. Even the cracks in [[Mercy]]'s madra channels carried the authority of this absolute decree, which [[Yerin]] eventually utilized to strike down a [[Monarch]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance]] is a one-of-a-kind, single-use weapon.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance]] arrows are a test of will for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance]] is an arrowhead that was the prize offered by the [[Abidan]] for the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Penance arrow]] sought its prey.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance]] is an arrow unleashed by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The true [[Penance]] does not require contact or being shot from a bow to function.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The true [[Penance]] functions by deciding who is dead.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The cracks in [[Mercy]]'s madra channels carried authority from [[Penance]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Penance]] is an absolute decree of death used by [[Yerin]] to strike down a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] loosed an attack called [[Penance]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
